# Step 04 — Edit Mode (Approved Qty Adjustment)

**Persona:** Approver (HOD / FC / GM / Owner)
**Module:** 3
**Section:** 3.4
**Route:** `/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid` (edit state)
**Parent Flow:** Approver — Review & Approve PR
**Last Updated:** 2026-04-21 — Added Purpose / Use Case to On Save and On Cancel action sections

---

## 1. Access Path

From **PR Detail** (step-03): click the **Edit** (✎) icon button → page transitions to Edit Mode in-place (URL unchanged).

Edit Mode is the mechanism by which the approver sets or adjusts the **Approved Quantity** for each line item and implicitly advances the PR through the workflow by saving.

---

## 2. Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    myapproval["1. My Approval Dashboard"] --> list["2. PR List"]
    list --> detail["3. PR Detail"]
    detail --> edit["4. Edit Mode - Approved Qty"]
    edit -->|Approve| approved(["PR Approved"])
    edit -->|Reject| rejected(["PR Rejected"])
    edit -->|Send for Review| review(["PR Returned"])
    style edit fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 3. Screen Layout

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ CARMEN  Procurement › Purchase Request        [Cancel]  [Save]  [💬]  [Asset]  │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  ◄ PR20260400002  [IN PROGRESS]                                                  │
│  Date: 2026-04-03    Objective: dffn (HOD) วัลภา    Department: Guest Service   │
│                                                        and Bell Staff            │
│  Workflow: ●—●—●—…                                                               │
│  Description: (empty)                                                            │
│                                                                                  │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │ [Items]  [Workflow History]                                                 │  │
│  │                                                                            │  │
│  │  Workflow History (active tab in Edit Mode):                               │  │
│  │                                                                            │  │
│  │  ● Submitted — dffn (HOD) วัลภา                        2026-04-08 07:00   │  │
│  │    Create Request                                                          │  │
│  │                                                                            │  │
│  │  ● HOD (Pending) ← current stage                       2026-04-08 07:00   │  │
│  │    dffn (HOD) วัลภา                                                       │  │
│  │                                                                            │  │
│  │  ● dffn (HOD) วัลภา — Create Request                  2026-04-17 09:16   │  │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 4. Header Fields (Edit Mode)

| Field | Edit Permission | Description | Remark |
|-------|-----------------|-------------|--------|
| PR Reference | View Only | PR number | Unchanged from read-only view |
| Status | View Only | IN PROGRESS badge | Unchanged |
| Date | View Only | Creation date | Unchanged |
| Objective / Requestor | View Only | Requestor name | Unchanged |
| Department | View Only | Creating department | Unchanged |
| Workflow Stepper | View Only | Stage progress dots | Unchanged |
| Description | View Only | PR description | Unchanged; not editable |

---

## 5. Items Tab — Editable Fields (Approver)

Per BRD FR-PR-011A, the approver can edit only **Approved Quantity** and **Item Note**. All other fields are read-only (visible). Vendor/pricing fields visible in read-only per BRD.

| Field | Edit Permission | Description | Remark |
|-------|-----------------|-------------|--------|
| Location | View Only | Store/kitchen location | Not editable by Approver |
| Product Name | View Only | Item name | Not editable by Approver |
| Description | View Only | Item description | Not editable |
| Item Note | **Editable** | Free text note per item | Approver may add justification for qty change |
| Vendor Selection | View Only | Assigned vendor | FR-PR-011A: read-only for Approver |
| Currency | View Only | Currency code | FR-PR-011A: read-only for Approver |
| Exchange Rate | View Only | Rate vs base currency | FR-PR-011A: read-only for Approver |
| Unit Price | View Only | Price per unit | FR-PR-011A: read-only for Approver |
| Discount Rate | View Only | Discount % | FR-PR-011A: read-only for Approver |
| Discount Override | View Only | Manual discount amount | FR-PR-011A: read-only for Approver |
| Tax Profile | View Only | Tax category | FR-PR-011A: read-only for Approver |
| Tax Override | View Only | Manual tax amount | FR-PR-011A: read-only for Approver |
| FOC Quantity | View Only | Free of charge qty | Visible; not editable by Approver |
| **Approved Quantity** | **Editable** | Qty the approver approves | Primary field for approver action |
| Request Quantity | View Only | Original qty requested | Reference; not editable in any status by approver |
| Delivery Point | **Editable** | Delivery destination | Approver may update per FR-PR-011A |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** The live UI in Edit Mode (as observed from screenshots) shows the Workflow History tab active, not the Items tab. It is not confirmed from screenshots whether the Items tab renders editable Approved Qty fields in the current UI state, or whether the Approved Qty edit is surfaced through a different mechanism. Mark as TBC pending additional screen capture of Items tab in Edit Mode.

---

## 6. Action Buttons (Edit Mode)

| Button | Location | Color | Type | Enabled When | Behaviour |
|--------|----------|-------|------|--------------|-----------|
| Cancel | Top right | Neutral/outline | Text button | Always in Edit Mode | Exits Edit Mode; discards unsaved changes; returns to PR Detail (step-03) |
| Save | Top right | Blue (primary) | Text button | Always in Edit Mode | Saves Approved Qty changes; exits Edit Mode |
| Comment (💬) | Top right | Neutral | Icon button | Always in Edit Mode | Opens comment dialog without exiting Edit Mode |
| Asset | Top right | Neutral | Button | Always visible | Opens Asset tab/section |
| Items | Tab | — | Tab button | Always | Switches to Items tab |
| Workflow History | Tab | — | Tab button | Always | Switches to Workflow History tab |

**No Approve/Reject/Return buttons appear in Edit Mode.** The Save action is the mechanism for advancing/recording the approver's decision via Approved Qty.

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** BRD FR-PR-005A states that Approvers should see Reject, Return, and Approve buttons. Edit Mode in the live UI provides only Cancel, Save, and Comment. There is no Reject or Return flow observable in the HOD Edit Mode. Expected to be consistent for FC/GM/Owner (same Edit Mode UI) — not directly verified due to no PRs at those stages in ZB01 test data.

---

## 7. Validation on Action

### On Save

**Purpose / Use Case:** Persist Approved Qty entries without advancing the workflow — use to save partial approvals or hold for further review before bulk-actioning items.

| # | Check | BR | Pass Behaviour | Fail Behaviour |
|---|-------|----|----------------|----------------|
| 1 | Approved Quantity ≤ Requested Quantity for each item | FR-PR-011 | Save proceeds; green toast "Purchase Request updated successfully"; Edit Mode exits; PR Detail shown | TBC — not confirmed in UI |
| 2 | Approved Quantity ≥ 0 | FR-PR-011 | Save proceeds | TBC |
| 3 | At least one item has Approved Qty set (if required) | FR-PR-005A | Save proceeds; status remains IN PROGRESS after save | TBC — whether all items must have Approved Qty filled |
| 4 | PR still in IN PROGRESS status at save time (no concurrent action) | FR-PR-005 | Save proceeds | TBC — conflict handling not observed |

### On Cancel

**Purpose / Use Case:** Exit Edit Mode and discard all unsaved Approved Qty changes — use when you entered Edit Mode by mistake or want to start fresh.

| # | Check | BR | Pass Behaviour | Fail Behaviour |
|---|-------|----|----------------|----------------|
| 1 | Cancel clicked (with or without unsaved changes) | FR-PR-011 | **Immediate** return to PR Detail read-only (step-03); all unsaved changes discarded; Edit button re-appears | N/A |

> ✅ **Confirmed in UI:** No discard confirmation dialog appears. Cancel is always immediate regardless of whether changes were made.

---

## 8. Business Rules

| # | Rule | FR Reference |
|---|------|-------------|
| BR-01 | Approver can only edit Approved Quantity and Item Note in Edit Mode | FR-PR-011A |
| BR-02 | Approver sees vendor and pricing fields in read-only during Edit Mode | FR-PR-011A |
| BR-03 | Save records the approver's Approved Qty change in the audit log | FR-PR-011 |
| BR-04 | Cancel discards all unsaved changes | FR-PR-011 |
| BR-05 | Workflow History visible in Edit Mode (same tab as read-only view) | FR-PR-005 |
| BR-06 | Edit Mode only accessible when PR is IN PROGRESS at approver's stage | FR-PR-011 |
| BR-07 | Approver cannot approve own PR; Edit button hidden for own PRs | BR-PR-015 |
| BR-08 | Comments added during Edit Mode are saved independently of Save action | FR-PR-008 |
| BR-09 | Approved Quantity supports 3 decimal places (e.g., 12.500 kg); displayed per product unit configuration | FR-PR-002 |
| BR-10 | All monetary amounts displayed with 2 decimal places; quantities per product config; exchange rates with 5 decimal places | FR-PR-003 |
| BR-11 | Financial calculations use half-up (banker's) rounding: Subtotal = Round(Qty × UnitPrice, 2); Discount = Round(Subtotal × Rate, 2); Net = Round(Subtotal − Discount, 2); Tax = Round(Net × TaxRate, 2); Total = Round(Net + Tax, 2) | FR-PR-003 |
| BR-12 | FOC items automatically set unit price to 0; Approved Qty for FOC items independent of unit price | FR-PR-011A |

---

## 9. Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| Approver sets Approved Qty = 0 for all items | TBC — may be treated as implicit rejection or allowed as 0-qty approval |
| Approved Qty > Requested Qty entered | TBC — field accepts any number; server-side validation not yet confirmed |
| Another approver saves simultaneously (race condition) | TBC — optimistic lock or last-write-wins |
| Session times out while in Edit Mode | Redirect to login; unsaved changes lost |
| User clicks Cancel without making changes | Immediate return to read-only; no dialog; no diff in PR data |
| PR status changes to APPROVED between entering and saving Edit Mode | TBC — save may fail with stale-data error |
| Approver edits Approved Qty but does not change it from requested | Valid; Save proceeds; no change logged (or logs no-op) |
| Network error during Save | TBC — retry mechanism or error toast |

---

## 10. Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|------------|
| Click Save | Exit Edit Mode → step-03 PR Detail (updated) |
| Click Cancel | Exit Edit Mode → step-03 PR Detail (unchanged) |
| Click Comment (💬) | Comment dialog opens; stays in Edit Mode |
| Click Items tab | Items tab in Edit Mode |
| Click Workflow History tab | Workflow History tab in Edit Mode |

---

## 11. API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| PATCH | `/api/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid` | Save Approved Qty changes |
| POST | `/api/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid/comment` | Save comment (separate from Save) |
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-request/:uuid` | Load current state on Edit Mode entry |

---

---

## 13. Bulk Item Actions in Edit Mode (FR-PR-026)

**Confirmed implemented (2026-04-16).** The bulk action toolbar appears on the Items tab when one or more row checkboxes are selected — in **both read-only and Edit Mode**.

### How to Trigger

The "Select all" control (`<button role="checkbox" aria-label="Select all">`) is a React compound component that opens a **dropdown menu** when clicked — it is not a native checkbox.

1. Enter **Edit Mode** (click Edit button)
2. Click the **Items** tab
3. Click the **"Select all" button** (top-left of items grid)
4. A dropdown appears:
   - **Select All Purchase Request Items (N Items)** — selects all rows
   - **Select Only Status Pending (N Items)** — selects PENDING items only
   - Cancel
5. Choose an option — checkboxes activate and the **bulk action toolbar appears above the items grid**

> **Note:** Works in both read-only and Edit Mode. Clicking individual row checkboxes directly is unreliable in this React component — use the "Select All" dropdown.

### Confirmed Bulk Action Buttons

| Button | Colour | BRD Name | Min Selection | Comment Required | Role Availability | Purpose / Use Case |
|--------|--------|----------|--------------|-----------------|------------------|-------------------|
| **Approve** | Green | Approve Selected | 1 item | No | ✅ HOD · Assumed ✅ FC / GM / Owner | Approve one or more PRs in a single action — use when all selected PRs are reviewed and ready to pass to the next stage |
| **Send for Review** | Outline/Gray | Return Selected | 1 item | Yes (min 10 chars) | ✅ HOD · Assumed ✅ FC / GM / Owner | Return selected PRs to the Creator with a reason — use when items need correction, clarification, or additional information before approval |
| **Reject** | Red/Destructive | Reject Selected | 1 item | Yes (min 10 chars) | ✅ HOD · Assumed ✅ FC / GM / Owner | Permanently decline selected PRs — use when the request is not justified or cannot be fulfilled; Creator cannot resubmit a rejected PR |
| **Split** | Outline | Split | 2 items | No | ✅ HOD · Assumed ✅ FC / GM / Owner | Split selected line items into separate PRs — use when different items require different approval chains or delivery timelines |
| ~~Set Date Required~~ | — | Set Date Required | — | ❌ Not present in live UI | ❌ All roles | ❌ Not present in live UI |

> ⚠️ **Label discrepancy:** BRD FR-PR-026 specifies "Return Selected"; live UI shows **"Send for Review"**.
> ⚠️ **Missing action:** "Set Date Required" (BRD FR-PR-026) is absent from the live toolbar.

### Split Action

Split allows the Approver to partially approve a PR when some items are ready and others need revision:

1. Select 2+ items using checkboxes
2. Click **Split**
3. Choose split type: By Approval Status / By Vendor / By Delivery Date / Manual
4. System creates a new PR with the split items (status: Returned → requestor)
5. Original PR retains remaining items (proceeds to next stage)
6. Both PRs linked via `parent_pr_id` for audit trail

![Edit Mode — Bulk Action Toolbar (1 item selected)](data:image/png;base64,)


---

## 14. Asset Button in Edit Mode

In Edit Mode the top-right toolbar shows: **Cancel** | **Save** | **Comment** | **Asset**

| Button | Description | Observed Behaviour |
|--------|-------------|-------------------|
| Asset | Opens Asset-related section or fields | Visible in Edit Mode toolbar; specific behaviour TBC |

The **Asset** button is likely related to PR Type = "Fixed Asset" (FR-PR-001). When the PR type is Asset, additional asset-tracking fields may appear. For non-Asset PRs, the button may be disabled or a no-op.

> **Discrepancy:** The Asset button was observed in the Edit Mode toolbar screenshot but its exact function was not captured. TBC whether it opens a separate tab, a dialog, or additional inline fields.

---

## 15. Multi-Currency in Edit Mode (FR-PR-029)

In Edit Mode, the Approver sees the same dual-currency display as in read-only view (transaction + base currency in green). The Approver **cannot** change currency or override exchange rate — those fields are read-only in Edit Mode for the Approver role.

| Field | Approver Edit Mode |
|-------|--------------------|
| Currency | View Only |
| Exchange Rate | View Only |
| Unit Price (transaction currency) | View Only |
| Converted amounts (base currency, green) | View Only |



---

## 16. Role Differences (HOD / FC / GM / Owner)

All four approver roles share the same PR Detail and Edit Mode screens. The differences observed in the live app:

| Role | My Approval — Total Pending | PR Scope | Hotel Entity | Stage in Workflow |
|------|-----------------------------|----------|--------------|-------------------|
| HOD (Department Manager) | 39 (all PRs at HOD stage) | **Own department only** | ZB01 - ZEBRA (AVG) | 1st approval stage |
| FC (Financial Controller) | 14 (6 PR + 8 PO) | **All departments** | ZB01 - ZEBRA (AVG) | 2nd approval stage |
| GM (General Manager) | 0 (no pending items at GM stage in test data) | **All departments (org-wide)** | ZB02 - ZEBRA (FIFO) | 3rd approval stage |
| Owner | 0 (no pending items at Owner stage in test data) | **All departments (org-wide)** | ZB02 - ZEBRA (FIFO) | 4th approval stage |

> ⚠️ **Discovery:** GM and Owner test accounts are associated with a **different hotel entity** (ZB02 - ZEBRA (FIFO)) than HOD and FC (ZB01 - ZEBRA (AVG)). This is a test-data configuration difference — all four roles have **org-wide cross-department visibility** (FC, GM, Owner per FR-PR-009). No PRs exist at the GM or Owner approval stage in the current test data; the empty state message reads: *"You have no documents waiting for your approval at the moment."*

> ⚠️ **Discovery:** The FC approval list shows a **mix of document types** (PR and PO) — 6 Purchase Requests and 8 Purchase Orders in the same My Approval queue. HOD's queue shows only PRs. This suggests document-type filtering behaviour differs by role or approval stage.

### Permission Differences

| Feature | HOD | FC | GM | Owner |
|---------|-----|----|----|-------|
| View PRs — own department | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| View PRs — all departments | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Edit (adjust Approved Qty) | ✅ (confirmed) | ✅ (assumed) | ✅ (assumed) | ✅ (assumed) |
| Approve action button | ❌ not in UI | ❌ not in UI | ❌ not in UI | ❌ not in UI |
| Reject action button | ❌ not in UI | ❌ not in UI | ❌ not in UI | ❌ not in UI |
| Return action button | ❌ not in UI | ❌ not in UI | ❌ not in UI | ❌ not in UI |

> ℹ️ Edit mode for FC, GM, and Owner was not directly confirmed in this session as no PRs were at those stages. Permissions marked "assumed" follow FR-PR-011A which applies the same rules to all Approver roles.

### Feature Behaviour by Role (HOD confirmed; FC/GM/Owner assumed per shared UI)

| Feature | HOD | FC | GM | Owner |
|---------|-----|----|----|-------|
| Bulk action toolbar (checkbox select) | ✅ Confirmed | Assumed ✅ | Assumed ✅ | Assumed ✅ |
| Bulk: Approve / Send for Review / Reject / Split | ✅ Confirmed | Assumed ✅ | Assumed ✅ | Assumed ✅ |
| Bulk: Set Date Required | ❌ Absent | Assumed ❌ | Assumed ❌ | Assumed ❌ |
| Vendor comparison table (FR-PR-028) | ❌ Not present | Assumed ❌ | Assumed ❌ | Assumed ❌ |
| On Hand / On Order in expanded item card | ✅ Confirmed | Assumed ✅ | Assumed ✅ | Assumed ✅ |
| Drill-through from On Hand / On Order | ❌ Not present | Assumed ❌ | Assumed ❌ | Assumed ❌ |
| Dual currency display (if non-base currency) | ⬜ TBC | ⬜ TBC | ⬜ TBC | ⬜ TBC |
| Dual unit display (order unit ≠ base unit) | ⬜ TBC | ⬜ TBC | ⬜ TBC | ⬜ TBC |
